source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for refined product UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for multilingual headings, labels, and numeric rhythm.
layout: Precise 8px grids, feather-eye medallion accents, ornamental dividers, portfolio cards, and dense editorial surfaces.

prompts.label: Transparent peacock motif source
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a peacock feather eye motif, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A refined peacock feather eye with accurate barbs, iridescent teal, cobalt, emerald, bronze, and gold markings, crisp feather strands, and natural plume texture.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the feather or eye marking.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves iridescent feather color and fine barb detail.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no landscape, no decorative background, no second subject.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Peacock" derived from the transparent peacock feather eye cutout.
Reference use: The light and dark design-system boards are the reference for coding any future theme. Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the teal, cobalt, emerald, bronze, and gold feather eye.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, high-resolution 4K-class source, at least 2400px wide when available.
Required visible sections: Morphous Peacock, Peacock, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Portfolio, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; use labels like Geist, Noto Sans JP, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 数値.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command palette, sidebar navigation, portfolio cards, dashboard charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style ornate portfolio system, precise grid, 8px card radius, subtle feather-eye dividers, refined monsoon garden surfaces.
Color palette: use only motif-derived teal, cobalt, emerald, bronze, gold, garden neutrals, and deep feather ink.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Peacock".

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the visible Morphous Peacock design-system board. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: The light and dark design-system boards are the reference for coding any future theme. Use the transparent peacock feather eye cutout and the light-mode Morphous Peacock board as references. Preserve palette roles, ornamental feather dividers, component language, spacing, typography, and shadcn/tweakcn coverage.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, high-resolution 4K-class source, at least 2400px wide when available.
Required visible sections: Morphous Peacock, Peacock, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Portfolio, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Visual details: dark background derived from feather ink and rain garden shadow, readable text from pale plume, primary accents from peacock teal and cobalt, status from emerald, focus from gold, depth from bronze, subtle iridescent feather texture overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple gradients, no flat pure-black-only background, no illegible text, no random brand names.
